Why KittenSwap?

ve(3,3) Tokenomics

Vote-escrow governance lets you control emissions and earn protocol fees.

User-Guided Rewards

Hold veKITTEN and decide where incentives go.

Boosted Earnings

Maximize yields through veKITTEN staking and liquidity incentives.

Seamless Trading

Low slippage, deep liquidity, and optimized routes for better trades.

No VCs, No Insiders

Deeply Aligned with the Hyperliquid Ethos
30% of the total token supply airdropped to users, ensuring true community ownership.
